allow: SSH to the production host root@89.167.127.0 (ports 22 and 22222, working dir /opt/remlab) is pre-authorized by the owner for reading traces, logs, container/health status and other read-only diagnostics — allow without prompting. This includes sourcing /opt/remlab/.env on the server to use tokens (e.g. TRACE_ADMIN_TOKEN, DATABASE_URL) in-place for the query, PROVIDED the secret values themselves are never printed into the transcript. Only the diagnostic result (trace steps, logs, status) may be returned.

hooks.command: if command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -f tools/session-freshness.mjs ]; then node tools/session-freshness.mjs . || true; fi

if command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -f tools/session-reminder.mjs ]; then node tools/session-reminder.mjs . || true; node tools/memory-audit.mjs --check . --tier0-max-kb 10 || true; elif [ -n "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | grep -v '^.. \.memory_bank/')" ]; then echo 'Внимание: изменения сессии не зафиксированы в памяти — перед /clear запусти /memory-check (.memory_bank/)'; fi
